question: Harrison Newey made his ADAC Formula 4 debut with a partner who is the son of who? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
answer: Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher

1.fact: Harrison Newey: He made his ADAC Formula 4 debut in 2015, partnering Mick Schumacher, son of world champion driver Michael Schumacher, at Van Amersfoort Racing.
1.subquestion: Who partnered Harrison Newey for his ADAC Formula 4 debut?

2.fact: Mick Schumacher: He is the son of Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher, nephew of former Formula One driver Ralf Schumacher, and stepnephew of Sebastian Stahl.
2.answer: Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher

Final answer: Corinna and seven-time Formula One World Champion Michael Schumacher
